changelog: 🚀 Application Experience & Activation Updates
Smoother Activation Experience

Auto-Populated Details: When installing the app on a non-licensed machine for the first time, the Activation Window now automatically populates your Machine ID and required details—eliminating manual copying and pasting.
Flexible Support & Activation Channels
Send your activation requests instantly using your preferred communication tool:
💬 WhatsApp: Launches the standard WhatsApp Desktop app (whatsapp://) or opens WhatsApp Web directly in your default browser.
✉️ Email: Opens your local mail client (like Outlook) via mailto:, or routes you directly to a pre-composed message screen in Gmail Web or Outlook Web.
📋 Smart Fallback: Copies your activation details (Email + Machine ID) to your clipboard automatically for quick manual pasting if you prefer a different method.
Interface & Performance Enhancements
🔔 Notification Log: A new bell icon is located next to the 🌓 Mode selector in the top-right bar. Click it to open a persistent log of your notifications.
⚙️ Under-the-Hood Optimizations: General bug fixes and performance improvements for a faster, more stable experience.
🛠️ New Features by Tab
1. Masters Tab
🔡 Case Converter (Ledgers/Items): Batch convert the casing (upper, lower, or title case) of Ledgers and Stock Items in Tally Prime.
👤 Smart Address Book: View, filter, and export party address books, as well as print mailing envelopes.
2. Invoices Tab
🔄 Voucher Numbering & Type Tools: Convert voucher numbering settings from Auto to Manual (while preserving existing numbers) and bulk change voucher types.
📄 Bulk PDF Invoice Generator: Fetch sales vouchers, set custom headers, add footer terms or diagonal watermarks, and batch export them as individual or merged PDFs.
3. Universal Grid Tools
🖨️ Universal PDF Export: Right-click on any data grid or table (ttk.Treeview) anywhere in the application to access the new Export to PDF... option in the context menu.
